nasb.text: But the Spirit explicitly says that in later times some will fall away from the faith, paying attention to deceitful spirits and doctrines of demons,

esv.text: Now the Spirit expressly says that in later times some will depart from the faith by devoting themselves to deceitful spirits and teachings of demons,

cnv.text: 聖靈明明地說，日後必有人離棄信仰，跟從虛謊的邪靈和鬼魔的教訓。

ccb.text: 圣灵明确地说，日后必有人离弃真道，去追随那些迷惑人的邪灵和鬼魔的学说。

csbs.text: 不过圣灵明确地说，在末后的时代有些人会离开这信仰，听从迷惑人的邪灵和鬼魔的教义。
